name: daily
description: Date-organized daily notes via Obsidian's core Daily Notes plugin + Calendar; ports accuris's Timestamps pattern under spice/daily/. v0.1.4: contributes Today nav-button (invoke_command -> daily-notes; the core daily-notes plugin's 'Open today's daily note' command id) requiring nav-buttons >=2.3.0; filename pattern dddd-YYYY-MM-DD per v0.4.2 platform invariant. v0.2.0: SpaceDailyDashboard panels (tasks + meetings) migrated to BeaconCards via panel-host wrapper preserved + per-panel dv shim ({container: subContainerEl}); tasks panel rendered ABOVE meetings panel (S2 user feedback); tasks use synthetic-page pattern with onClick to parent file. v0.2.2: adds autorun:true on app start + Cmd+[ binding for the daily-notes command (consumes new hotkeys[] manifest field shipped with convenience@0.1.0 mechanism in v0.21.1). v0.2.5 PATCH: ships hidden <!-- COWORK_CALLOUTS --> anchor above ## Notes for cowork@0.1.0 callout insertion. v0.2.6 PATCH (v0.31.0 S6.6 — daily dashboard polish): SpaceDailyDashboard meeting filter widened startsWith(today) → includes(today) so trailing-date naming Foo-2026-05-12.md is matched (accuris convention); dashboard container gains box-sizing/width/max-width/overflow-x: hidden so narrow viewports no longer scroll horizontally; task list items gain word-break + overflow-wrap so long no-space task strings wrap. v0.3.0 MINOR (v0.33.0 wave 2): adopts claude_surface[] — ships canonical /daily slash command + open-today SKILL.md + resolvers row. v0.5.0 MINOR (v0.64.0): reclaims canonical ownership of ranch/templates/Daily Note.md (cowork@0.9.1 dropped its competing copy). daily-template.md absorbs Templater preamble + cowork-flavor frontmatter (type/day/day_label/created_at/tags) + H1 + COWORK_CALLOUTS marker. SpaceDailyDashboard grows third 'Today's Activity' panel that delegates to customJS.ActivityFeed.render with new asOf + includeMtime opts (anchors time window to the daily note's date; catches edited-not-just-created notes via file.mtime). Activity panel excludes daily/cowork-daily/cowork-weekly/cowork-monthly types to avoid self-reference. Existing tasks + meetings panels unchanged. v0.5.1 PATCH (v0.64.1): three fixes from headspace smoke. (1) BUGFIX SpaceDailyDashboard activity-panel shim now delegates `.pages` to the real dv — v0.5.0 shim only had `.container`, so ActivityFeed._query's `dv.pages()` call failed with 'dv.pages is not a function' and the panel never rendered. (2) Tasks panel: render markdown links `[text](url)` + wikilinks `[[target]]` (and `[[target|alias]]`) as clickable HTML anchors via new `_renderTaskHTML(text)` helper; LI click still opens parent daily note for clicks outside any anchor; wikilink anchors wire onclick → app.workspace.openLinkText. (3) COWORK_CALLOUTS anchor switched from HTML-comment `<!-- COWORK_CALLOUTS -->` to Obsidian `%% COWORK_CALLOUTS %%` syntax — invisible in BOTH source AND reading mode (HTML comments are only invisible in reading mode). Cowork orchestrator skills + content files + manifest descriptions updated in lockstep (cowork@0.9.1 → 0.9.2 PATCH). v0.5.2 PATCH (v0.64.2): three polish fixes. (1) Activity-panel allowlist drops `scratch-day` + `to-do` — both are per-day auto-created notes that flood the panel with predictable noise. (2) Smart title resolver `_resolveTitle(p)` tries `title:` frontmatter → `aliases[0]` → first heading in `file.outline` → filename fallback. Surfaces user-meaningful titles for timestamp-named scratches once user adds `title:` or `aliases:`. (3) Visual polish: each of the 3 main sections (Tasks / Meetings / Activity) wrapped in `<details>` with colored left border + count in summary; default open. Activity sub-groups (one per blueprint type) wrapped in `<details>` via ActivityFeed's new `collapsible` + `colorByType` opts; default closed. Per-blueprint accent colors from Obsidian `--color-*` CSS variables (themable). depends_on bumped activity-feed >=0.1.1 → >=0.1.2. v0.5.3 PATCH (v0.64.3): two fixes from v0.64.2 headspace smoke. (1) BUGFIX `_resolveTitle` was crashing with `aliases.values is not a function` when scratch / meeting notes had no `aliases:` frontmatter — Dataview's `p.file.aliases` is a Proxy/DataArray where `.values` is a non-callable property (not Array.prototype.values). The throw aborted BeaconCards mid-render, leaving activity-panel cards visually empty. Wrapped resolver in try-catch + simplified aliases probe to length-only (any throw falls back to filename). (2) Allowlist drops `meeting` — already has its own dedicated top-level 'Today's Meetings' panel; duplicate inside Activity was noise. Allowlist now: scratch, journal, project, person, team, product, trip, budget, paycheck, invoice. v0.6.0 MINOR (v0.65.0 cowork-scheduling-cycle): SpaceDailyDashboard _DEFAULT_DASHBOARD_BLUEPRINTS allowlist widens to include 6 cowork run-note types (cowork-morning-briefing/midday-tripwire/eod-review/finance-snapshot/weekly-review/monthly-review). Scheduled-job atomic notes now surface in "Today's Activity" under their own blueprint groups (groupBy:"blueprint" already on). No new section; no new icon. v0.7.0 MINOR (v0.66.0): Activity Dashboard Cohesion cycle. SpaceDailyDashboard sections (Tasks/Meetings/Activity) render via _renderSection helper backed by NEW sauce-daily-dashboard.css snippet (chevron-right rotates on [open], muted-uppercase group headers replace nested <details>, mobile pass at @media max-width:480px). Activity panel consumes activity-feed@0.3.0 opts: rollUpRoots (project + trip descendant edits coalesce into a single hub card — closes FLN-v64-8), flatGrouped (one-tap reveal at outer section), metaBuilder ([page,parentEl]=>void wires per-card time + type pill + breadcrumb meta via cards@0.2.6 function-form meta). depends_on activity-feed bumped >=0.1.2 → >=0.3.0; new snippets[] + appearance.enabledCssSnippets[] manifest fields installed via convenience@0.41.0 applySnippets plumbing. v0.7.1 PATCH (v0.66.1): three smoke fixes. (1) Section titles drop "Today's" prefix — "Tasks"/"Meetings"/"Activity" (the daily-note context already implies today). (2) Activity section defaults to closed (was open) — the review-y panel is now opt-in; Tasks + Meetings stay default-open since they're actionable. (3) _resolveTitle gains a frontmatter `name:` check BEFORE the existing title/aliases/outline/filename chain — project hubs at <slug>/Project.md were resolving to the literal filename "Project"; the project blueprint stores the real name in `name:`. depends_on activity-feed bumped >=0.3.0 → >=0.3.1 (synthetic rollup page now carries the name field). v0.8.0 MINOR (v0.67.0): Activity Drill-In + Polish. _renderActivityMeta rewritten with Luxon duck-type time fix (FLN-v66-7 — closes every-card 12:00 AM regression), inline drill-in expansion for rollup cards (click \"N notes touched\" → list of children with HH:MM, sorted by file.mtime DESC, capped at 12 + \"+N more\"), universal open-todo badge (\"☐ N\" pill) wired into Meetings panel via BeaconCards meta function-form and Activity meta-line. Activity section icon swapped zap → activity (Lucide heartbeat). Activity section default-open (existing if activityCount > 0 gate handles non-empty). Segmented per-blueprint left accent on Activity section — CSS custom property \"--sauce-accent-segments\" rendered via ::before pseudo-element; Tasks/Meetings unchanged (single-color border-left). Four new helpers: _formatTime (Luxon duck-type), _renderTodoBadge, _renderDrillInList, _buildAccentSegments. _renderSection accepts new optional accentSegments param. _getActivityCount returns {total, byBlueprint} for segment sizing. CSS additions (~50 lines) in sauce-daily-dashboard.css. depends_on activity-feed bumped to >=0.3.2 (consumes _rollUpChildrenPages). v0.8.1 PATCH (v0.67.1): four fixes from user smoke. (1) Drill-in `[hidden]` collapse — CSS `display: flex` was clobbering the [hidden] attribute's UA `display: none`; moved display rule into `:not([hidden])` selector. (2) Drill-in DOM placement — drill-in `<div>` now appended to the CARD root (walking parentEl.parentElement.parentElement) instead of the meta row, so it spans full card width below the title/meta row instead of squeezing the title into ellipsis on desktop. (3) Section icon vertical alignment — `.sauce-section-icon` gets `display: inline-flex; align-items: center` + inner `svg { display: block }` to remove the inline baseline gap. (4) `_getActivityCount` now mirrors ActivityFeed's rollup logic — synthetic rollup roots are counted (and project descendant counts roll up to the project blueprint) so the segmented accent reflects the cards that actually render, not just direct-hit allowlist matches. byBlueprint bucketing maps project-* / trip-* to their parent blueprint for consistent color resolution. v0.8.2 PATCH (v0.67.2): two fixes from user smoke. (1) Segmented accent ordering — `_buildAccentSegments` now sorts byBlueprint entries alphabetically so segments render top-down in the same order ActivityFeed groups (project before scratch, etc.). Pre-v0.8.2 the iteration mixed direct-hits (scratches first) before rollup roots (project second), producing inverted accent vs. visual content. (2) COWORK_CALLOUTS marker syntax changed from Obsidian `%% COWORK_CALLOUTS %%` to standard markdown link-ref `[//]: # (COWORK_CALLOUTS)`. The `%% %%` syntax was visible in source mode AND in live-preview when cursor parked on the line — users saw the marker text in their daily notes. `[//]: # (...)` is invisible in BOTH Reading mode AND Live Preview (only visible in Source mode), matching the original intent. Daily template + commands/daily.md doc updated; cowork blueprint 0.10.0 → 0.10.1 PATCH ships matching syntax in Weekly/Monthly Note + About Cowork + 5 orchestrator/skill SKILL.md files. Behavior contract unchanged — cowork orchestrators still locate the anchor by literal string match, just against the new syntax. v0.8.3 PATCH (v0.67.3): user-feedback simplification of daily template + retire segmented accent. (1) Daily template — removed the COWORK_CALLOUTS anchor (both `[//]: # (...)` form from v0.8.2 and any prior `%% %%` form remained user-visible in Live Preview); removed the `## Notes` heading; appended a `---` horizontal-rule divider after the dashboard dataviewjs block as the visual separator between platform-rendered content and the user's free-write space. Cowork orchestrators that previously located the marker now fall through `patch-daily-callouts/SKILL.md`'s absent-marker-and-no-Notes-heading branch (append at EOF). (2) Activity section accent — retired the v0.8.0 segmented per-blueprint gradient. Activity now uses single-color `accent: "grey"` (new CSS rule `[data-accent="grey"] { border-left: 4px solid var(--text-faint) }`), matching the user's preference for a subtle grey throughout. `_buildAccentSegments` retained as dead code (HC-V067-1d still asserts it exists); future cycle may remove if not re-used. DD-T1 test regex updated: drops COWORK_CALLOUTS positive-assert + adds COWORK_CALLOUTS-absent + `## Notes`-absent negative-asserts. v0.9.0 MINOR (sauce v0.69.0): SpaceDailyDashboard Activity panel now surfaces board activity (spice/boards/To-Do-Board.md hub edits + new board-card creations under spice/boards/cards/**). Three changes in the helper: allowlist gains kanban + board-card; blueprint color map gains kanban: var(--color-pink); rollup rules gain a single-board entry with hardcoded rootPathFromDv -> spice/boards/To-Do-Board.md (constant, unlike the slug-derived project/trip rules). One rolled-up 'To Do Board' card per day; drill-in lists today's touched card files. Title resolves via the existing title-resolver branch from the hub's `title: To Do Board` frontmatter. No new helpers; no CSS changes; no manifest depends_on changes (boards blueprint emits the `type: board-card` and `type: kanban` frontmatter directly).

post_install.message: Daily blueprint installed at spice/daily/. REQUIRED: enable the core Daily Notes plugin (Settings → Core plugins → Daily notes) AND optionally the Calendar community plugin (Settings → Community plugins → Browse → Calendar). Run command 'Daily notes: Open today's daily note' (or click a date in Calendar) to create your first daily note.
